strengths: Currently building AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on expertise in AI-agent platforms and strategic technical initiative
20 years of continuous software engineering across full-stack, cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and infrastructure—significantly exceeding the 15-year requirement with proven staying power
Founded and maintains GISCollective as ongoing open-source platform; demonstrates ability to lead technical vision, mentor others through workshops, and teach across multiple domains
concerns: AI specialization is recent (4 months into current role); prior 19 years of career show no demonstrated machine learning or AI product development
Lacks preferred Master's or PhD degree in AI; educational background is general Computer Science with supplementary fine arts training
No track record of building or shipping recognized AI products or platforms at enterprise scale; entrepreneurial work is domain-specific infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Current AI infrastructure expertise (MCP, agentic workflows)
20 years of continuous engineering across full-stack and cloud
Limited AI/ML specialization prior to recent role

response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional engineering depth across two decades with full-stack capability spanning infrastructure to AI, plus proven ability to lead through founding GISCollective and mentoring others. His current role at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators directly aligns with modern AI strategy—and though this expertise is recent, it represents an active, hands-on commitment to AI platforms rather than theoretical study. His primary challenge is that AI specialization is newly acquired and he lacks the preferred advanced degree in AI or prior enterprise-scale AI product shipping, which would more decisively position him for a director-level strategy role.
